heading: What I Know About Your Business
subheading: Facts AskBiz has learned from your conversations — used to personalise every answer
askBizPrompt: Based on what you know about my business, what should my top priority be right now?
emptyBody: Start chatting in Ask and AskBiz will automatically learn facts about your business — margins, products, goals, challenges — and use them in every future answer.
emptyBtnPrompt: What is my gross margin on my best-selling product?
footer: Facts are extracted automatically from your conversations. Delete any that are wrong — AskBiz will relearn from future chats.
